description:
Create internal/md package with two files:

render.go — Functions producing tokenized markdown strings:
- Escape(s) — escapes { in user text to prevent token collisions
- IssueSummary(iss) — # heading with {status:}, {id:}, {type:} tokens, escaped title
- IssueOneLiner(iss) — compact line with {status:}, {id:}, {p:} tokens
- Description(desc) — escaped raw text (no header)
- Children(children, store) — ## CHILDREN with {check:}, {id:}, {p:}, {dep:} tokens
- BlockedBy(tips) — ## BLOCKED BY section
- Unblocks(deps) — ## UNBLOCKS section
- Comments(comments) — ## COMMENTS section with escaped text
- FormatDeps(iss) — inline {dep:blocks:id} / {dep:blocked_by:id} tokens

resolve.go — Two resolution functions:
- ResolveMarkdown(tokenized) — tokens → clean markdown for agents
- ResolveTTY(tokenized, width) — tokens → plain TTY text → wrap.Text() → ANSI colorize

Token vocabulary (~12 types): {status:open/closed/in_progress/blocked/deferred}, {p:0-4}, {id:ID}, {type:TYPE}, {check:done/open}, {dep:blocks:ID}, {dep:blocked_by:ID}

TTY pipeline: resolve tokens to plain text (with extras like ● dots), wrap at terminal width via existing internal/wrap package, then apply ANSI coloring using Claude Code conventions (Bold+Cyan headings, priority colors, Cyan IDs, etc.).

Also add ⊘ blocked icon to issue.StatusIcon() for open issues with unresolved blockers.

Files: internal/md/render.go, internal/md/render_test.go, internal/md/resolve.go, internal/md/resolve_test.go
title: Create internal/md renderer and resolver
